text_block_list.text:
With a fantastic performance in the<n>Twinkle Series,
Narita Taishin has had<n>an impressive first three
years.

The way she triumphs over the best<n>despite her
small stature inspires all<n>those who watch her.
And now, she's become quite the<n>celebrity.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin! Can I get a word,<n>please?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: I'd like to speak with you too, if<n>possible!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh...

text_block_list.name: Taishin Fan
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Can I have your signature?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I guess.

text_block_list.name: Taishin Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, yay! I'll treasure it for<n>the rest of my
life!

text_block_list.name: Gamer A
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't that Taishin playing over<n>there?

text_block_list.name: Gamer B
text_block_list.text: What?! Do you think she'd battle us<n>if we ask?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is so exhausting.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone and their mom is asking for<n>interviews,
and I can't even walk<n>down the street without
being<n>recognized.
choice_data_list: They're all head over heels for you.
They're all head over heels for you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I hate all this fuss over me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I just want some peace and quiet.
choice_data_list: Should I leave you alone, then?
Should I leave you alone, then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yea—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hang on—no, you're fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're... You're all right.

We spend some time together and<n>quietly
reminisce about the<n>adventures we've shared.

We talk about the day we met and<n>how I was
completely blown away by<n>her final sprint.

And there was the Satsuki Sho,<n>where the "top
three"—the BNW<n>trio—faced off in a race that would
become Narita Taishin's turning point.

There was also the way she seized<n>victory in the
Arima Kinen through<n>sheer tenacity.

All in all, we don't exchange many<n>words, but the
conversation flows<n>smoothly. It's completely dark
before<n>we know it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's night already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Creek always makes a huge deal<n>and gets on my
case when I get back<n>late, so I'd better go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: What's up? I thought you were leaving.
What's up? I thought you were leaving.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I used to run so people would<n>acknowledge me.
It's the same<n>reason I entered races.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I was interested in was<n>running,
winning, and being validated<n>for doing so well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But now, I really like it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Running, racing... I like it all.
Narita Taishin smiles after saying this.

It's a pure, lighthearted smile, straight<n>from her
heart.
